dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8040 IH: No Mercy for Terrorists Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Biggs of South Carolina introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To amend title 18, United States Code, to increase the penalties for terrorists.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the No Mercy for Terrorists Act of 2026.

subsection.text: Section 2339A of title 18, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking imprisoned not more than 15 years and inserting imprisoned not less than 20 years or for life;
by striking for any term of years or; and
by inserting or punished by death after for life.

subsection.header: Providing material support or resources to designated foreign terrorist organizations
subsection.text: Section 2339B(a)(1) of title 18, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking imprisoned not more than 20 years and inserting imprisoned not less than 20 years or for life;
by striking for any term of years or; and
by inserting or punished by death after for life.
